message:
feat(test): expand cx.rs inline tests from 15 to 34

Add 19 new tests covering CxRuntimeBuilder (current_thread, multi_thread,
with_tuning), with_cx_async, spawn_with_cx (single/multiple/cloned cx),
try_spawn_with_cx, spawn_bounded_with_cx (empty/ordering/concurrency),
spawn_with_timeout (success/timeout), Cx checkpoint, nested with_cx_async,
and RuntimeTuning copy/custom construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
